widgets_values:
Foundation layout workflow for VN scene blocking. Use the environment image as the actual canvas. For shaped placement, load a white-on-black or alpha silhouette/rough person mask, then move/scale/rotate/stretch it in Compositor3. Mask source switch: 1 = alpha mask from the loaded silhouette image, 2 = white-on-black extraction from the silhouette image. For quick box/rough painting, use PreviewBridge and switch the final ImageMaskSwitch to input 2. OpenPose/control image is included as a visual placement layer only; no Flux2 ControlNet is wired here until an exact Flux2-compatible ControlNet node/model is available. Add a real character LoRA between UNETLoader and CFGGuider when the LoRA file exists.

Two bypassed person LoRA nodes are inserted after UNETLoader. Enable them when real character/person LoRA files exist; LoRA 1 is intended as the primary identity LoRA and LoRA 2 as an optional outfit/style/detail LoRA.

visual novel foundation image, insert the referenced person into the masked area of the provided environment, correct scale and perspective, natural contact shadows, matching lighting, full body or bust according to prompt, preserve the room outside the mask, coherent spatial relationship with nearby furniture
wrong position, wrong scale, floating body, bad contact shadow, extra limbs, deformed hands, duplicate person, changed environment outside mask, distorted furniture, text, watermark, low quality

groups.title: Input environment and manual placement mask
FLUX2 foundation inpaint with person references
